Golden Phoenix,
Stratford-upon-Avon

Authentic Chinese restaurant in Stratford-upon-Avon featuring aromatic Northern cuisine and traditional flavours in the heart of Shakespeare country.

Make a Reservation

Authentic Chinese Cuisine | Lunch & Dinner

In the heart of Stratford-upon-Avon, Golden Phoenix serves aromatic Chinese dishes crafted with traditional techniques and the finest ingredients. Join us for lunch or dinner to experience the authentic taste of Northern China.

"

An extraordinary dining experience. The flavours transport you straight to Beijing, yet the warmth and welcome are unmistakably Stratford.

Menus

Discover Golden Phoenix's Chinese cuisine, from our signature crispy aromatic duck to fiery Sichuan classics. Enjoy it all at one of the most celebrated restaurants in Stratford-upon-Avon.
